title: Scalable Execution & Fault Tolerance
problem: Jobs remain stuck in 'CREATED' status and lack automated retry loops when workers crash.
solution: Implemented a distributed, resilient background engine using Kafka and Redis with exponential backoff.

title: Data Immutability & Secure Sharing
problem: Need for securely storing files while preserving cryptographic proofs of integrity against tampering.
solution: Leveraged AES for robust encryption and integrated a blockchain-based mechanism to guarantee file verification.

title: Real-time Telemetry Bottlenecks
problem: High-volume log ingestion was slowing down analysis and delaying critical root-cause alerting.
solution: Restructured to use Elasticsearch and Kafka pipelines, and integrated deep-learning algorithms for rapid anomaly detection.

title: Latency in Live Processing
problem: Analyzing high-frequency live data streams and computing rolling metrics with cloud delays.
solution: Built a Python-based edge decision engine utilizing WebSockets and instant rolling computations to eliminate round-trip latency.
